mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM exam_records ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_records (exam_id, student_id, student_number, student_name, start_time, end_time, submit_time, total_score, score, correct_count, wrong_count, unanswered_count, status, duration_minutes, ip_address, user_agent, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{studentNumber}, #{studentName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{submitTime}, #{totalScore}, #{score}, #{correctCount}, #{wrongCount}, #{unansweredCount}, #{status}, #{durationMinutes}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_records exam_id = #{examId}, student_id = #{studentId}, student_number = #{studentNumber}, student_name = #{studentName}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, total_score = #{totalScore}, score = #{score}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, wrong_count = #{wrongCount}, unanswered_count = #{unansweredCount}, status = #{status}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, user_agent = #{userAgent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{studentName},'%')
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{studentName},'%') AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{studentName},'%')
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{studentName},'%') AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status} AND total_score >= #{minScore}
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE status = 1
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE status IN (2, 3)
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT AVG(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN (2, 3) AND score IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status} AND score IS NOT NULL
SELECT MAX(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT MAX(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT MIN(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT MIN(score) FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT AVG(score) FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status IN (2, 3) AND score IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records er JOIN exams e ON er.exam_id = e.id WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId} AND er.status IN (2, 3) AND er.score >= e.pass_score
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records er JOIN exams e ON er.exam_id = e.id WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId} AND er.status IN (2, 3) AND er.score < e.pass_score
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE status = 3
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime}
SELECT * FROM exam_records ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_records SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE exam_records er SET er.status = 3, er.submit_time = #{submitTime}, er.end_time = #{submitTime}, er.updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE er.status = 1 AND er.start_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, er.start_time, #{submitTime}) >= (SELECT e.duration FROM exams e WHERE e.id = er.exam_id)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM exam_records ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM exam_records WHERE created_at > #{createdAt}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_records WHERE status = #{status} AND submit_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
